value: ESMA Guidelines for the assessment of knowledge and competence
Firms should ensure staff providing relevant services possess the necessary knowledge and competence.
CSSF publishes the list of bodies providing external training within Circular 17/670.

target_audience_summary.value: Persons under CSSF prudential supervision who provide investment advice or information on financial instruments, investment services or ancillary services.

independent_operator_examples.name: HACA Partners
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Specialist MiFID/compliance training body appears in the validated competitor set rather than only broad academy noise.

independent_operator_examples.name: First Finance SAS
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Specialist finance-training provider appears in the validated external training landscape.

independent_operator_examples.name: EFPA Luxembourg
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Specialist professional body/training route proves a focused paid competence market exists.

independent_operator_examples.name: House of Training
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Incumbent CSSF-listed provider with public MiFID route.

pricing_or_offer_proof: Validated public competitor landscape includes multiple commercial training bodies, though clean price normalization is still missing.
value.social_funnel_signal: No Facebook-group-led funnel signal is captured yet in the validated evidence set.
value.takeaway: This is not just an incumbent-academy market; there is a specialist commercial competence-training layer around MiFID.
value.why_not_stronger: The market exists, but current proof is stronger on provider presence than on clean search-visible small-operator pricing.

independent_operator_summary.omission_reason: Derived independent-operator signal for prioritization and further market research. Keep it out of customer-facing copy until translated into product-safe language.
